title: Blob Lifecycle
description: Post-storage operations: extending lifetimes, deleting, burning, sharing blobs, blob attributes, and storage pools.

title: Data Security
description: Encrypt data with Seal threshold encryption and onchain access control. Covers the Seal SDK, seal_approve, and Nautilus TEE.

title: HTTP API
description: Publisher and aggregator REST API for storing and reading blobs over HTTP. Covers endpoints, parameters, and response formats.

title: Move Integration
description: Wrap Walrus blobs in Sui Move contracts. Covers Move.toml setup, the WrappedBlob pattern, and the SharedBlob API.

title: Quilts
description: Batch many small blobs into a single storage unit to save costs by amortizing the per-blob metadata overhead.

title: Storage Costs
description: Pricing, cost estimation, and the dual-token model (WAL + SUI). Covers the cost calculator, dry-run, and optimization.

title: Troubleshooting
description: Common error messages and fixes across the CLI, TypeScript SDK, HTTP API, Move integration, and Seal.

title: TypeScript SDK
description: Programmatic blob storage with the @mysten/walrus TypeScript SDK. Covers client init, browser upload relay, and Vite config.

title: Walrus CLI
description: Store, read, and manage blobs with the CLI client. Covers installation, configuration, JSON mode, and gas budgets.

title: Walrus Memory
description: Persistent encrypted AI agent memory. Covers TypeScript and Python SDKs, MCP server, memory spaces, and delegate keys.

title: Walrus Overview
description: High-level overview of what Walrus is, how it works, architecture, terminology, and which tool to choose.
